content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative single-model refinement pipeline as a primitive single-perspective precursor to multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework where Self-Refine's bootstrapped initial iterations prepare low-quality outputs for multi-perspective reflection to unlock higher gains without extra training. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no supervised data or additional training while resolving its limitation of being stuck in local optima from single-perspective feedback.
